meaning: n.[希神]珀尔修斯(宙斯之子,杀女怪 Medusa 的英雄),[天]英仙座
examples: James Bond is the Hercules or Perseus of the modern age.
The hero is Perseus, called a demi-god, because his father is Zeus the god, while his mother a human.
Having established Perseus as a fearless hunk, however, the misshapen script won't give him a girl to love.
Hamlin as Perseus struggled to tame a white-winged Pegasus and to battle the snake-haired Medusa.
The NYT says Perseus execs are flying to Seattle this week to talk to Amazon.
